version_description: Based on the studio album. Standard chords are used.
tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: How Am I Supposed To Live Without You

content:
[Intro]
[ch]A[/ch] [ch]F#m7[/ch]
[ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]A/C#[/ch] [ch]Dmaj7[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]D/F#[/ch] [ch]E/G#[/ch]
[ch]A[/ch] [ch]F#m7[/ch]
[ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]A/C#[/ch] [ch]Dmaj7[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]D/F#[/ch] [ch]E/G#[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab] [ch]A[/ch]               [ch]F#m7[/ch]             [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]A/C#[/ch] [ch]Dmaj7[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]D/F#[/ch] [ch]E/G#[/ch]
Kissing you was not what I had planned,[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]A[/ch]              [ch]F#m7[/ch]              [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]A/C#[/ch] [ch]Dmaj7[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]D/F#[/ch] [ch]E/G#[/ch]
And now I'm not so sure just where I stand.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]       [ch]A/C#[/ch]        [ch]Esus[/ch]      [ch]E[/ch]
I wasn't looking for true love,[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bm[/ch]         [ch]A/C#[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Gadd9[/ch]
But now you're looking at me.[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Bm[/ch]   [ch]A/C#[/ch]       [ch]Esus[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]
You're the only one I can think of,[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Bm[/ch]   [ch]A/C#[/ch]   [ch]G6[/ch]  [ch]D/F#[/ch] [ch]E7sus[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]
You're the only one I see.[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab] [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]B/D#[/ch]  [ch]D/F#[/ch] [ch]A/E[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
All I    need,[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]D/E[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]
Is just a little more time,[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]B/D#[/ch]        [ch]D/F#[/ch]  [ch]A/E[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
To be sure what I feel,[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]D/E[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]
Isn't all in my mind,[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]B/D#[/ch]              [ch]D/A[/ch]
'Cause it seems so hard to believe,[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]A[/ch] [ch]F#m7[/ch] [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]A/C#[/ch] [ch]Dmaj7[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]D/F#[/ch] [ch]E/G#[/ch]
That you're all I need.[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab]   [ch]A[/ch]                      [ch]F#m7[/ch]          [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]A/C#[/ch] [ch]Dmaj7[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]D/F#[/ch]
I guess it's true we've all been hurt before,[/tab]
[tab][ch]E/G#[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]             [ch]F#m7[/ch]        [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]A/C#[/ch] [ch]Dmaj7[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]D/F#[/ch] [ch]E/G#[/ch]
But it doesn't seem to matter anymore.[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Bm[/ch]       [ch]A/C#[/ch]          [ch]Esus[/ch]   [ch]E[/ch]
It may be a chance we're taking,[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Bm[/ch]      [ch]A/C#[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]G2[/ch]
But it always comes to this.[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Bm[/ch]         [ch]A/C#[/ch]      [ch]Esus[/ch]    [ch]E[/ch]
If this isn't love we're making,[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bm[/ch]            [ch]A/C#[/ch]    [ch]G6[/ch]  [ch]D/F#[/ch]  [ch]E7sus[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]
Then I don't know what it is.[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab] [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]B/D#[/ch]  [ch]D/F#[/ch] [ch]A/E[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
All I    need,[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]D/E[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]
Is just a little more time,[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]B/D#[/ch]        [ch]D/F#[/ch]  [ch]A/E[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
To be sure what I feel,[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]D/E[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]
Isn't all in my mind,[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]B/D#[/ch]              [ch]D/F#[/ch]  [ch]A/E[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]D/E[/ch]
'Cause it seems so hard to believe,[/tab]

[Instrumental]
[ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]A/C#[/ch] [ch]Esus[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]
[ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]A/C#[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]G2[/ch]
[ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]A/C#[/ch] [ch]Esus[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]
[ch]Bm[/ch] [ch]A/C#[/ch] [ch]G6[/ch] [ch]D/F#[/ch] [ch]E7sus[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]

[Chorus]
[tab] [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]B/D#[/ch]  [ch]D/F#[/ch] [ch]A/E[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
All I    need,[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]D/E[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]
Is just a little more time,[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]B/D#[/ch]        [ch]D/F#[/ch]  [ch]A/E[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
To be sure what I feel,[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]D/E[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]
Isn't all in my mind,[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]B/D#[/ch]              [ch]D/F#[/ch]  [ch]A/E[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
'Cause it seems so hard to believe,[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]D/E[/ch]     [ch]F#m7[/ch]
That you're all I need.[/tab]

[Coda]
[tab]    [ch]B7/A[/ch]            [ch]E/G#[/ch]
No stars are out tonight,[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C#m7[/ch]            [ch]F#m7[/ch]
But we're shining our own light,[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]B7sus[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
And it's never felt so right,[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]E7sus[/ch]
Cause girl the way I'm feeling,[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]E[/ch]
It's easy to believe,[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]A[/ch]  [ch]F#m7[/ch] [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]A/C#[/ch] [ch]Dmaj7[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]D/F#[/ch] [ch]E/G#[/ch]
That you're all I need.[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]  [ch]F#m7[/ch]               [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]A/C#[/ch] [ch]Dmaj7[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]D/F#[/ch] [ch]E/G#[/ch] [ch]Aadd9[/ch]
        You're all I need.[/tab]
